title: Sword of Stone
description: Transforms into a powerful [gold]Relic[/gold] after defeating [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Elites[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic displays a counter tracking elite defeats. After defeating 5 elites in combat, it automatically transforms into Sword of Jade.
